isolation_opt_out_reason: Retroactive feature dir creation 2026-05-23 closing D-AUDIT-8 from comprehensive PR↔docs sync audit. Feature work shipped 2026-04-29 → 2026-05-08 (campaign ran 2026-04-30 → 2026-05-01 IDT; case study published in PR #170 on 2026-05-02; final scripts + summary landed in PR #264 on 2026-05-08). The campaign branches (feature/hadf-phase2-fingerprint + chore/hadf-phase2-progress-snapshot) and the dedicated worktree at /Volumes/DevSSD/FitTracker2-hadf-campaign/ are documented in the case study Methodology Notes; this state.json is a retroactive ledger entry, not a new working tree.

timing.total_wall_time_note: Campaign wall time spans 2026-04-29 (pre-registration authored) → 2026-05-01 22:43 IDT (campaign closed by user direction) → 2026-05-08 (final summary artifact landed in main as squash a4b357f via PR #264). Pre-registration immutable; raw data collected over ~2 calendar days (early closure documented in case study Methodology Notes). Wall-time instrumentation not captured at runtime — state.json created retroactively 2026-05-23.

research.notes: Pre-registration authored at .claude/shared/hadf/phase2-preregistration.json (immutable, hash-verified). Defines IV/DV, controls, schedule, validity floor 600, three abort conditions. Plan: ~/.claude/plans/floofy-finding-boole.md.

prd.notes: N/A — measurement study, no PRD; success/abort criteria pre-registered instead.

tasks.notes: N/A — pre-registration defines the experiment, not a task list.

implementation.notes: Campaign collection 2026-04-30 07:00 IDT → 2026-05-01 22:43 IDT. 11 scheduled+manual fires. 700 valid records (locked-700-fires1to7.jsonl) + 200 contaminated records segregated (fire 8 broken venv + fire 9 missing env keys). Mid-campaign incidents documented in case study Methodology Notes §Mid-Campaign Incident Disclosure.

testing.notes: Analyzer run via scripts/hadf-phase2-analyze.py on locked-700 file. Verdict: silhouette=0.5566 at best_k=5; clusters_found=true; path_b_recommendation=green-lit.

review.notes: Case study + Tracks 3/4 research notes drafted post-analysis; published via PR #170.

merge.notes: PR #170 published case study (2026-05-02). PR #264 landed final summary artifact + scripts in main (2026-05-08; squash SHA a4b357f). PR #265 updated case study citations to canonical squash SHA.

documentation.notes: Case study + showcase MDX (slot 22b) + Tracks 3/4 deep research notes.

complete.notes: Retroactive transition timestamp — D-AUDIT-8 audit-close ledger entry. The feature shipped 2026-04-29 → 2026-05-08; this 'complete' phase entry exists to satisfy PHASE_TRANSITION_NO_TIMING gate on the retroactive state.json creation commit.

tasks.name: Campaign execution (11 fires; locked-700 dataset)
tasks.note: 700 valid records (350 openai + 350 anthropic) collected 2026-04-30 → 2026-05-01 IDT. Mid-campaign isolation pivot (5c096bc) — wrapper made portable; switched to dedicated worktree at /Volumes/DevSSD/FitTracker2-hadf-campaign/. Two contaminated batches segregated (fires 8+9). Campaign closed by user direction 2026-05-01 22:43 IDT after locked-700 reached.

tasks.name: Analyzer run + case study publication
tasks.note: Analyzer verdict: silhouette=0.5566 at best_k=5; clusters_found=true; path_b_recommendation=green-lit. Case study published via PR #170 alongside Tracks 3/4 deep research notes. None of the 3 pre-registered abort conditions fired.
